templates.title: The Inheritance Question
templates.scene: In {year}, the question of who carries the {surname} name forward can no longer be deferred. {member} has earned the patriarch's eye, but {rival} has not stopped circling — and {peril} looms over the whole house.

choices.text: {member} consolidates the line and freezes {rival} out
choices.outcome: The succession is settled by force of will. {rival} will not forget it.
A divided house, but a wider one. The {surname} name holds together — for now.

templates.title: The Story Breaks
templates.scene: A scandal breaks over {place} in {year}: the {surname} empire is suddenly the headline, and {peril} could follow if it is mishandled.

choices.text: {member} denies everything and counterattacks the press
choices.outcome: The denial buys time and burns trust in equal measure.
The comeback narrative writes itself. The name re-launders, slowly.
